title: sub_GAME_7F05F73C grenade/flare/piton round: raw newobj+0x82 write corrupts maxdamage, leaves timer=0

evidence.path: src/game/gun.c:4970 writes *(s16*)((u8*)newobj+0x82)=1200 on a WeaponObjRecord (via ObjectRecord* newobj). Retail ASM: li 1200 / sh 0x82(v0) = WeaponObjRecord.timer (grenade fuse, N64 0x82). ObjectRecord is locked at native 0x90 (grew +0x10, 4 pointers; test_struct_layout.c:44), so timer sits at native 0x92 and the raw 0x82 write lands in maxdamage (native 0x80) -> corrupts maxdamage, leaves timer=0. Same fn already carries FID-0085/0087; this sibling write was missed. Reachable: every grenade-launcher/flare/piton round in SP. Fix: ((WeaponObjRecord*)newobj)->timer=1200.
